name: Progressive Web App with Next.js
description: Convert a Next.js app into a PWA with offline support, push notifications, home screen installation, and app-like navigation. Uses next-pwa with Workbox service worker strategies.

steps.description: Wrap next config with withPWA() — configure caching strategies and workbox options
Create Web App Manifest: name, icons (192px, 512px), theme_color, display: standalone, start_url
Add <link rel="manifest">, meta theme-color, and apple-touch-icon to document head
Create subscribeToPush(), sendPushNotification(), and unsubscribe() using Web Push API
Add custom service worker logic: background sync, offline page, push event handler
